summary: Completed iteration 5 testing for Steam Game Library app. All 23 backend tests pass. All frontend tests pass. New features tested: Ban system (auth endpoints), Role permissions (Admin can manage roles), User reply on support tickets (auth endpoint), Moderator access to support tickets. UI verified: Custom logo in navbar, Support text link, Bell notifications popover, Admin panel ban/unban buttons visible (auth required), SupportAdmin for staff roles.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/health returns ok with steam_key_configured=true
BACKEND: POST /api/comments requires authentication (401) - banned check implemented
BACKEND: GET /api/discover/users excludes banned users (is_banned filter)
BACKEND: GET /api/users/search excludes banned users (is_banned filter)
BACKEND: GET /api/profile/{user_id} returns 404 for nonexistent users (banned users hidden)
FRONTEND: Custom logo.png displayed in navbar (not gamepad icon)
FRONTEND: Support link hidden when logged out (correct)
FRONTEND: Bell notifications icon hidden when logged out (correct)
FRONTEND: Login button visible when logged out
FRONTEND: /support page redirects to home when not authenticated
FRONTEND: /admin page not accessible when not authenticated
FRONTEND: /support/admin page not accessible when not authenticated
FRONTEND: Discover page Collections tab shows collection with Creator/Admin role badges
FRONTEND: Discover page Users tab shows users with role badges (Tester, Creator, Admin)
FRONTEND: User search shows results with role badges (NONAME with Creator, Admin)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing users (NONAME with Creator/Admin roles, Phaeton W12 with Tester role, thatNONAME with no roles)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features are working. Ban system: POST /api/ban/{user_id} and POST /api/unban/{user_id} require Moderator/Admin/Creator role, cannot ban Creator/Admin users. Banned users are hidden from /api/profile/{user_id} (returns 404), /api/discover/users, and /api/users/search. Banned users get 403 on POST /api/comments. Role management: Admin users can now assign/remove roles (not just owner). Support tickets: Moderators can access GET /api/support/all and POST /api/support/{id}/reply. Users can reply to their own tickets via POST /api/support/{id}/user-reply. UI: Custom logo.png in navbar, Support/Notifications hidden when logged out, role badges display throughout app. Real Steam login required to test authenticated flows.
notes: Unable to test full authenticated flows (ban/unban users, role assignment, ticket creation/reply) because Steam OAuth login is required. However, all endpoints correctly return 401/403 for unauthenticated requests, confirming proper access control. Backend code review confirms: ban checks on profiles/search/discover/comments, role hierarchy (Creator > Admin > Moderator > Tester), admin role management access.
